entries.definition:
قَصَم qaṣama i [v. trans.] to totally demolish, to shatter (21:11)
وَكَمْ قَصَمْنَا مِنْ قَرْيَةٍ كَانَتْ ظَالِمَةً how many a community of evildoers We
have shattered.
